name: e2e-v2-continuation-continue
description: Approve an ask-mode continuation with /flow continue and run the linked child flow.

stages.prompt: Reply exactly E2E_V2_CONTINUE_PARENT_SOURCE and do not inspect or modify files.

Reply exactly {"summary":"E2E_V2_CONTINUE_PARENT","nextFlowSpec":{"schemaVersion":2,"name":"e2e-v2-continuation-continue-child","agent":"scout","readOnly":true,"tools":["read","grep","find","ls"],"flow":{"stages":[{"id":"child","type":"task","prompt":"Reply exactly E2E_V2_CONTINUE_CHILD_OK and do not inspect or modify files."}]}}} and do not inspect or modify files.
